rows.label: tlk45320292_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Superbia is still holding out,
but it could sink at any time.

rows.label: tlk45320292_03_msg0002
rows.name:
I hope my wife and children
are all right... Did they
evacuate safely?

rows.label: tlk45320292_03_msg0003
rows.name:
At times like this, I can only
regret that we failed to build
friendly ties with Invidia[ML:Dash ]!
